hub.title: Advanced tools
hub.subtitle: You'll rarely need to visit this page day to day.
hub.auditText: Full history of system actions and sent communications.

profile.title: My profile
profile.text: Update your name, email and login password.

equipe.title: Team
equipe.text: Invite practitioners, manage roles and clinic access.

practitioners.title: Practitioners
practitioners.text: Public profile, specialty and schedule for each practitioner.

branding.title: Branding
branding.text: Your clinic's logo and primary color on the portal and booking pages.

regional.title: Regional
regional.text: Default timezone and currency used across the platform.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.text: Google Calendar, Zoom and iCal feed for Apple Calendar.

lgpd.title: Privacy & data protection
lgpd.text: Manage patient data deletion requests (right to be forgotten).

usage.title: Account usage
usage.text: Patients, users and resources consumed on the current plan.

sessionTypes.title: Session types
sessionTypes.text: Modalities, durations, prices and Zoom setup per type.

offers.title: Offers & packages
offers.text: Create session packages and monthly plans visible in the patient portal.

lembretes.title: Automatic reminders
lembretes.text: Configure appointment reminders via WhatsApp and email.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp Bot
whatsapp.text: Configure the AI assistant: name, program, prices and language.

voice.title: AI calls
voice.text: AI answers calls in Portuguese and English with a neural voice. Same persona as the WhatsApp Bot.

intake.title: Intake forms
intake.text: Questions patients answer before the appointment.

billing.title: Billing
billing.text: Subscription, trial period, upgrades and invoices.

profile.title: My profile
profile.subtitle: Update your login details.
profile.emailHint: A confirmation will be sent to the new address.
profile.emailSent: Confirmation sent to the new email.

regional.title: Regional
regional.subtitle: Clinic default timezone and currency.
regional.cardDesc: Affects how dates, times and amounts are displayed across the platform.

usage.title: Usage and limits
usage.subtitle: Track your current plan limits and your clinic's real usage.
usage.noClinic: Clinic not set up. Complete onboarding to see usage data.

lgpd.title: Privacy & data protection
lgpd.subtitle: Manage patient data deletion requests (right to be forgotten).

security.title: Security
security.helper: Row Level Security status and two-factor authentication.

mfa.title: Two-factor authentication (2FA)
mfa.active: Active — your account is protected with TOTP.
mfa.inactive: Add an extra layer of security to your login.
mfa.setupDesc: Scan the QR code with Google Authenticator, Authy or similar. Then enter the generated code.

equipe.subtitle: Manage clinic members, roles and invites.
equipe.infoPractitionerDesc: — sees only their own schedule and patients seen
equipe.infoFrontDeskDesc: — schedule and patients, no financial data

practitioners.subtitle: Configure each team practitioner's public profile. Enable "Public schedule" so patients can choose the practitioner when booking online.
practitioners.emptyDesc: Invite team members by email. Once they accept the invite, they appear here for public profile setup.
practitioners.bioPlaceholder: Short introduction shown on the public booking page.
practitioners.bookableLabel: Appears on the public schedule (online booking)

sessionTypes.title: Session types
sessionTypes.subtitle: Manage modalities, durations and prices. Enable "Online" to create a Zoom meeting automatically.
sessionTypes.count: {count, plural, one {# type registered} other {# types registered}}
sessionTypes.name: Name
sessionTypes.onlineHint: Online session — creates a Zoom meeting automatically
sessionTypes.emptyHint: Click "+ New type" to get started.
sessionTypes.confirmDelete: Remove "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
sessionTypes.explainer: Types with Online enabled create a Zoom meeting automatically when booked — as long as Zoom is connected in Settings → Integrations. In-person types do not generate a Zoom link.

offers.title: Offers & packages
offers.subtitle: Create session packages, monthly plans and courses. Active offers appear in the patient portal.
offers.count: {count, plural, one {# offer registered} other {# offers registered}}
offers.name: Name
offers.descriptionPlaceholder: Details visible in the patient portal…
offers.emptyHint: Click "+ New offer" to create packages and plans.
offers.confirmDelete: Remove the offer "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
offers.infoTip: Active offers are visible in the Patient Portal and can be sold directly. Disable an offer to hide it without deleting its sales history.
